title: Rolson Heavy Duty Combination Slide Bolt Lock – 120mm 4 digit for added convenience 66509
description: Description Combination locks are great for simple security and no losing the keys! Fast and easy to install with the full set of instructions supplied. The unit has a corrosion-resistant zinc alloy body which is strong as well to resist tampering. It has a resettable four-digit combination and is supplied with anti-tamper security fixing screws. It is made from extra thick metal with a large easy-to-hold handle. Tamper proof: resettable combination number Heavy Duty: thick treated metal for extra strength Corrosion resistant: zinc alloy for rust resistance Comfortable grip: large shaped knob which is easy to hold Fixings: Anti tamper-proof security fixings supplied Bolt: 10mm solid chrome plated bolt Throw: extended 20mm throw and catch Packing piece and fixing set included: for fixing to may Size 125mm x 50mm x 50mm 330g
